description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Release Build that triggers on push to main, pull requests to main, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on an amazonlinux:2023 container, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and builds FBGEMM_GPU for CPU. It then uploads the built wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_and_publish_artifact job downloads the artifact, tests on GPU, and pushes to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
